caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is recorded in a studio setting against a dark, textured acoustic foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a black garment over a gray shirt. A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. In the initial moments, he looks slightly to his right with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he continues speaking, shifting his gaze slightly and eventually raising his left hand in a gesture, with his palm open and fingers spread. The camera remains stationary in a medium close-up shot, focusing on his upper body and head as he interacts with someone off-screen. No text or logos are visible in the frames.
